display.purpose: Login hero and rare large titles only.

headline.purpose: Panel titles and page headers inside forms.

body.purpose: Default UI copy, table cells, inputs.

label.purpose: Uppercase field labels and table column headers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main forward action on forms and dialogs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #16B49B; color: #fff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #62A99B; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16B49B; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions such as OAuth or cancel paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #fff; color: #5C5F64; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid #DDE1E2; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #FBFCFC; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #16B49B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard text and search inputs across auth and topbar.
components.css: .ds-field { display: block; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9AA1A3; } .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #fff; color: #181A1F; border: 1px solid #DDE1E2; border-radius: 0.75rem; padding: 0.625rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #16B49B; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9AA1A3; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Active and idle states for primary app navigation.
components.html: AgendaPacientes
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: none; color: #5C5F64; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(161, 234, 224, 0.4); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #16B49B; color: #fff; } .ds-nav-item-active:hover { background: #62A99B; }

components.name: Data Table Container
components.description: White bordered container for patient and inventory lists.
components.css: .ds-table-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #DDE1E2; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table-head { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #DDE1E2; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #9AA1A3; } .ds-table-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 1rem; padding: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #EBEDEE; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5C5F64; } .ds-table-row span:first-child { font-weight: 500; color: #181A1F; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.css: .ds-chips { display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-chip { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: #fff; color: #5C5F64; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #DDE1E2; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #FBFCFC; } .ds-chip-active { background: #16B49B; color: #fff; box-shadow: none; }

narrative.overview: Thalia is a product UI for staff who move between reception, treatment rooms, and back-office tasks. The visual system stays calm: a cool off-white canvas, white content panels, and turquoise for actions, selection, and active states. Density is moderate. Lists and tables carry real clinic data without decorative chrome.
keyCharacteristics: Geist sans for all UI text
FBFCFC canvas with white content panels
Turquoise primary for buttons, nav, and chips
Motion limited to hover and focus

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Clinic Turquoise carries primary actions, active navigation, and focus. Semantic colors appear only where status is the message.

rules.name: The Flat Canvas Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds stay canvas or surface. Do not stack tinted neutrals for decoration.

rules.name: The Product Sans Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce a second sans for UI chrome. One family from login through settings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Dashboard tables, sidebar, and lists have no drop shadow. If it needs depth, use a white surface and a border first.

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: No backdrop blur on navigation or modals.

dos: Do keep the canvas + surface panel rhythm on every app screen.
Do use pill buttons with verb + object labels in Spanish.
Do show focus rings on all interactive controls.
Do use skeleton loaders for list and block loading states.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism used purely for decoration.
Don't use excessive gradients or gradient text.
Don't use oversized rounded cards beyond the xl/2xl scale.
Don't use generic illustration packs or marketing metric hero blocks.
Don't use unnecessary animations or orchestrated page-load sequences.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide soft shadow on the same element.
